---
title: "Information Theory"
description: "Entropy, mutual information, KL divergence, channel capacity, rate-distortion."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
45 TUTORIALS
:::

# Information Theory

Entropy, mutual information, KL divergence, channel capacity, rate-distortion.
